mapper.select: SELECT INTERRIDX, MODULE_SRL, STRRESID, STRIFID, STRTYPE , STRLEVEL, STRTITLE, STRCONTENT, STRGROUPID, STRGROUPID1 , STRGROUPID2, STRGROUPID3, STRGROUPID4, STRGROUPID5, STRGROUPID6 , STRGROUPID7, STRGROUPID8, STRGROUPID9, STRGROUPID10, DATERAISEDATE , DATECLEARDATE, DATEREGDATE, STRCLEARCHECK, STRMEMO, STRACKNOWNCHECK , STRACKNOWNCHECK_MEMBER_SRL FROM xe_cvnms_error WHERE INTERRIDX > #{interrIdx} AND STRTYPE != 'ping' ORDER BY INTERRIDX

SELECT INTERRIDX, MODULE_SRL, STRRESID, STRIFID, STRTYPE , STRLEVEL, STRTITLE, STRCONTENT, STRGROUPID, STRGROUPID1 , STRGROUPID2, STRGROUPID3, STRGROUPID4, STRGROUPID5, STRGROUPID6 , STRGROUPID7, STRGROUPID8, STRGROUPID9, STRGROUPID10, DATERAISEDATE , DATECLEARDATE, DATEREGDATE, STRCLEARCHECK, STRMEMO, STRACKNOWNCHECK , STRACKNOWNCHECK_MEMBER_SRL FROM xe_cvnms_error WHERE DATECLEARDATE IS NOT NULL AND DATECLEARDATE > #{dateClearDate} AND STRTYPE != 'ping' ORDER BY DATECLEARDATE
